package.name: aruco_perception_yolo_bridge
package.description: rclpy node bridging the ROS graph to the YOLO-pipeline's isolated-venv HTTP inference server (~/yolo_venv, inference_server.py). Drop-in alternative to aruco_perception's classical aruco_detector_node for the aruco_marker case: subscribes to the camera image/camera_info topics, POSTs frames to the local inference server over plain HTTP, and republishes the result as geometry_msgs/PoseStamped on the same pose_topic (/aruco_perception/marker_pose) so calibration_broadcaster_node needs zero changes regardless of which detector produced the pose. Also publishes cup_holder/hole 2D pixel centroids continuously as visual_calibration_msgs/Detection2DArray on /aruco_perception/detections_2d, consumed by depth-perception's own hole/cupholder 3D pose pipeline. Deliberately kept out of aruco_perception (a pure ament_cmake/C++ package) and out of any process that imports both ultralytics and rclpy/cv_bridge -- see the ABI-isolation rule in error-mitigation.md #15.
